headerDisplay: Xiaomi Mi Homebridge plugin for devices using the MIoT protocol
footerDisplay: For a detailed description, see the README.

forceMiCloud.title: Force MiCloud connection
forceMiCloud.description: Use MiCloud instead of local connection even for devices that do not require it.

timeout.title: Request timeout
timeout.description: Request timeout in milliseconds. Has to be less or equal to the pollingInterval.

useCachedSession.title: Use cached MiCloud session
useCachedSession.description: Use the cached session to connect to MiCloud. Use the Ui to create/update the session.

ip.title: Device ip address
ip.description: The ip address of the device.

deviceId.title: Device id
deviceId.description: The unique device id of the device. Required for MiCloud devices.

model.title: The device model
model.description: The model of the device. Should only be specified when certain about the device model. If specified then the accessory will be created instantly without the need to first discover and identify the device.

prefsDir.title: Prefs directory
prefsDir.description: The location where to store device information. Default is: ~/.homebridge/.xiaomiMiot

pollingInterval.title: Background polling interval
pollingInterval.description: How often to check the status of the device in seconds.

propertyChunkSize.title: Property sync chunk size
propertyChunkSize.description: Size of a property chunk when syncing properties with the device. A lower value might reduce the load on the device. Range 1-14.

deepDebugLog.title: Enable deep debug log
deepDebugLog.description: Enables additional more detailed debug log. Useful when trying to figure out issues with the plugin.

silentLog.title: Enable silent log
silentLog.description: When enabled all log output will only appear in debug mode.

deviceEnabled.title: Device enabled
deviceEnabled.description: Disabling the device will not initiate polling. Useful when a device is longer offline and it should not automatically reconnect.

forceMiCloud.title: Force MiCloud connection
forceMiCloud.description: Use MiCloud instead of local connection even for devices that do not require it.

timeout.title: Request timeout
timeout.description: Request timeout in milliseconds. Has to be less or equal to the pollingInterval.

useCachedSession.title: Use cached MiCloud session
useCachedSession.description: Use the cached session to connect to MiCloud. Use the Ui to create/update the session.

customAccessory.title: Use custom accessory
customAccessory.description: Creates a custom empty accessory for the device which can be manually populated with services. Requires actionButtons, propertyControl or propertyMonitor to be set.

onlyMainService.title: Show only the main accessory service
onlyMainService.description: Only the main accessory service will be created without any additional services. Useful when wanting to have a clean layout. actionButtons, propertyControl or propertyMonitor can be used to manually add services.

buzzerControl.title: Buzzer control service
buzzerControl.description: Whether to show buzzer control buttons.

ledControl.title: Led control service
ledControl.description: Whether to show led control buttons.

childLockControl.title: Child lock control service
childLockControl.description: Whether the child lock control service is enabled.

modeControl.title: Mode control service
modeControl.description: Show mode switches which allow to change the device mode.

vacuumExtraControls.title: Robot vacuum extra controls
vacuumExtraControls.description: Show extra robot vacuum controls such as pause, resume, return to dock, suction level, cleaning mode and breakpoint resume when supported.

vacuumSuctionControl.title: Robot vacuum suction control
vacuumSuctionControl.description: Show suction level controls when the robot vacuum supports vacuum:suction-level.

vacuumSweepTypeControl.title: Robot vacuum cleaning mode control
vacuumSweepTypeControl.description: Show cleaning mode controls when the robot vacuum supports vacuum:sweep-type.

vacuumBreakpointResumeControl.title: Robot vacuum breakpoint resume control
vacuumBreakpointResumeControl.description: Show breakpoint resume control when the robot vacuum supports vacuum:sweep-break-switch.

suppressAutoServiceCreation.title: Suppress auto service creation
suppressAutoServiceCreation.description: Suppress auto creation of some sensor services.

swingControl.title: Swing control service
swingControl.description: Show a switch to quickly enable/disable horizontal and/or vertical swing mode.

moveControl.title: Move control service
moveControl.description: Whether to show switches which allows to move the fan left, right, up or down.

fanLevelControl.title: Fan level service
fanLevelControl.description: Show fan level switches which allow to change the fan level.

ioniserControl.title: Ioniser control service
ioniserControl.description: Show a switch which allows to quickly enable/disable the ioniser on your fan.

offDelayControl.title: Off delay control service
offDelayControl.description: Show a slider (light bulb) to control the auto shutdown timer.

horizontalAngleButtons.title: Horizontal angle buttons
horizontalAngleButtons.description: Allows to create buttons that can switch between horizontal oscillation angles.

verticalAngleButtons.title: Vertical angle buttons
verticalAngleButtons.description: Allows to create buttons that can switch between vertical oscillation angles.

heatLevelControl.title: Heat level service
heatLevelControl.description: Show heat level switches which allow to change the heat level.

screenControl.title: Screen control service
screenControl.description: Whether to show led control buttons.

motorControl.title: Motor control service
motorControl.description: Show motor control switches which allow to control the curtains.

heaterControl.title: Heater control service
heaterControl.description: Show a switch which allows to quickly enable the heater.

pm25Breakpoints.title: Pm25 breakpoints
pm25Breakpoints.description: Define a custom array of pm25 breakpoints. Provide an array with exactly 4 unique numbers.

co2AbnormalThreshold.title: Carbon Dioxide abnormal threshold
co2AbnormalThreshold.description: Define a custom carbon dioxide sensor abnormal threshold.

showTemperature.title: Show temperature
showTemperature.description: Show temperature if the outlet supports temperature reporting.

foodAmount.title: Food amount
foodAmount.description: The amount of food to dispense.

airFryerExtraControls.title: Air fryer extra controls
airFryerExtraControls.description: Show extra air fryer controls such as pause, resume, cancel, preheat, appointment time, food quantity and turn-pot when supported.

airFryerActionControls.title: Air fryer action controls
airFryerActionControls.description: Show stateless action buttons for Pause Cooking, Resume Cooking and Cancel Cooking when supported.

airFryerCustomPropertyControls.title: Air fryer custom property controls
airFryerCustomPropertyControls.description: Show custom MIoT property controls for preheat, appointment time, food quantity and turn-pot when supported.

yeelightLanControl.title: Use native Yeelight LAN protocol
yeelightLanControl.description: For Yeelight strip2/light devices, use the native Yeelight LAN protocol on port 55443 for HomeKit write commands, similar to Home Assistant. Requires LAN Control/Developer Mode enabled in the Yeelight app.

yeelightStatePollingInterval.title: Yeelight LAN state polling interval
yeelightStatePollingInterval.description: For devices using native Yeelight LAN control, poll the Yeelight LAN API every N seconds to refresh HomeKit state when the light is changed from the Xiaomi/Yeelight app. Set to 0 to disable.

yeelightLanErrorCooldown.title: Yeelight LAN error cooldown
yeelightLanErrorCooldown.description: When Yeelight LAN port 55443 refuses connections or times out, temporarily stop using the Yeelight LAN path for this many seconds and fall back to cached/Xiaomi state. Prevents Homebridge read-handler errors when LAN Control/Developer Mode is unavailable or IP changed.

yeelightSkipXiaomiPolling.title: Skip Xiaomi polling when Yeelight LAN is enabled
yeelightSkipXiaomiPolling.description: For yeelink.light.strip2 with Yeelight LAN control enabled, skip normal Xiaomi/MIoT property polling to avoid local timeout/reconnect loops. Yeelight LAN state polling will keep HomeKit in sync instead.

refinedHomeKitView.title: Refined HomeKit view
refinedHomeKitView.description: Enable richer native-looking HomeKit service layouts where supported. Device-specific options below can override this behavior.

vacuumRefinedHomeKitView.title: Robot vacuum refined HomeKit view
vacuumRefinedHomeKitView.description: Optional legacy experiment: expose robot vacuums as a Fanv2 primary service for a richer Apple Home card. Disabled by default so robot vacuums like Jamal remain on the robot-cleaner/vacuum accessory layout instead of being presented as a fan or air purifier.

vacuumLegacySwitch.title: Robot vacuum legacy switch
vacuumLegacySwitch.description: When robot-vacuum refined Fanv2 view is enabled, also expose a secondary switch for start/stop. This has no effect in the default vacuum layout where the main switch is already used.

airPurifierRefinedHomeKitView.title: Air purifier refined HomeKit view
airPurifierRefinedHomeKitView.description: Mark only real air-purifier devices as a native AirPurifier primary service so Apple Home shows the richer air-purifier control card. This does not affect robot vacuums such as Jamal.

airFryerRefinedHomeKitView.title: Air fryer refined HomeKit view
airFryerRefinedHomeKitView.description: Use a native HeaterCooler primary service for the air fryer so Apple Home shows a richer heat/temperature card instead of a plain switch.

airFryerExposeSwitch.title: Air fryer secondary power switch
airFryerExposeSwitch.description: Also expose a secondary On/Off switch for the air fryer when refined HeaterCooler view is enabled.

yeelightLanErrorLogLevel.title: Yeelight LAN error log level
yeelightLanErrorLogLevel.description: Controls logging for Yeelight LAN connectivity failures such as EHOSTUNREACH, ECONNREFUSED and timeouts. Default is debug so normal Homebridge logs are not flooded when a strip changes IP, is offline, or does not expose TCP port 55443.

layout.title: Global MiCloud Settings
layout.description: Configure global MiCloud connection details used for all devices.

items.description: Configure advanced plugin settings.

items.title: MiCloud Settings
items.description: Configure MiCloud connection details for this device.
